name: Avocado Stuffed with Smoked Fish (West Africa)
recipeIngredient: 6 Strips of fresh red bell pepper or pimiento
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the egg yolks from the whites and mash them with a spoon or fork until they form a smooth paste.
2. Add 1 tablespoon of lime juice, sugar, and salt to the mashed yolks. Mix well.
3. Gradually add vegetable oil to the mixture, one teaspoon at a time, ensuring each addition is absorbed before adding more. Stir in olive oil by teaspoonfuls while continuously mixing.
4. Incorporate the remaining lime juice into the sauce and season with salt as needed.
5. Remove the skin from the fish and discard any bones. Flake the fish finely using a fork.
6. Add the flaked fish, chopped egg whites, and sauce to the mixture. Toss gently but thoroughly.
7. Cut the avocados in half and remove the seeds. Clean away any brown tissue clinging to the flesh.
8. Spoon the fish mixture into each avocado half, dividing it evenly and slightly mounding it at the center.
9. Arrange 3 strips of red bell pepper or pimiento diagonally across the top of each avocado.
10. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
